<!--
Thanks for contributing. Please keep the PR scoped to one logical change —
short, focused commits are the norm here.
-->

## What this PR does



## Type of change
- [ ] New topic
- [ ] Update to existing topic
- [ ] New scenario
- [ ] Fix (typo, broken link, rendering glitch)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist
- [ ] Topic follows the standard template (TL;DR → Overview → Deep Dive → Trade-offs → Interview Qs → Scenarios → Related → References)
- [ ] Q&A blocks use HTML `<details>` / `<summary>`
- [ ] Internal links use relative paths
- [ ] The phase's `index.md` checkbox is updated if a new topic was completed
- [ ] Frontmatter `status` is set (`stub` / `in-progress` / `written`)
